Title: The Lincoln Highway
Author: Amor Towles
Notes: Favorite of the year. Loved the voice.

Title: The Personal Memoirs of Ulysses S. Grant
Author: Ulysses S. Grant

Title: Team of Rivals
Author: Doris Kearns Goodwin
Notes: Lincoln gets better every time I read about him.

Title: All the Light We Cannot See
Author: Anthony Doerr

Title: The Dutch House
Author: Ann Patchett
Notes: Thought about family a lot while reading.

Title: John Adams
Author: David McCullough
Notes: McCullough makes history feel like conversation.

Title: The Covenant of Water
Author: Abraham Verghese
Notes: Sweeping. Did not want it to end.

Title: The Evening and the Morning
Author: Ken Follett
Notes: Good prequel. Not quite as strong as original.

Title: Eisenhower in War and Peace
Author: Jean Edward Smith
Notes: Better on the military years than the presidency.

Title: The Island of Sea Women
Author: Lisa See
Notes: Fascinating culture I knew nothing about.

Title: Truman
Author: David McCullough
Notes: As good as his Adams book. Truman was a decent man.

Title: The Mystery of Mrs. Christie
Author: Marie Benedict
Notes: Fun but lighter than I usually like.

Title: The Warmth of Other Suns
Author: Isabel Wilkerson
Notes: One of the best nonfiction books I have read.

Title: Washington: A Life
Author: Ron Chernow
Notes: Washington is complicated. Chernow is reliable.

Title: Andrew Jackson: His Life and Times
Author: H.W. Brands

Title: JFK: Coming of Age in the American Century
Author: Frederick Logevall
Notes: Only the early years but well done.

Title: Herbert Hoover: A Life
Author: Glen Jeansonne
Notes: Fair reassessment. Still hard to warm to him.

Title: The Heaven and Earth Grocery Store
Author: James McBride

Title: The Women I Think About at Night
Author: Mia Kankimaki
